message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="Confirmed approval for consensus tally">
Scott Wlaschin: Confirmed APPROVED. I already gave my consensus in my re-review message after verifying all three blocking items were addressed. No additional concerns. Count me as 1 of 9.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thanks, Scott. Confirmed. We're at 7/9 unique approvers (Carson, Steve Krug, Marty, Kent, Steve Schoger, Scott, plus me as Driver = 7). Waiting on **Lea** and **Heydon** to verify their fixes and approve.
